data.supplierName: The Say Pharma Drug Store Llc

notes: Identifiers are represented as strings to preserve leading zeros.
Blank values, SAP NULL literals, and zero dates are represented as JSON null.
The detail export contains 148 purchase orders with a resolved effective expiry date.
The summary export contains 151 purchase orders and ETB 8,828,034,135.44, indicating that three summary-level purchase orders are outside this resolved-expiry detail set.
Columns 8 through 14 and workflow columns 24 through 27 remain positionally named because the headerless source does not establish their exact business labels.
The response contains the complete exported dataset in one page; production APIs should use server-side pagination.
